detail.heroEyebrow: Advanced training in technology and innovation

hero.title: Bachelor Degrees
hero.description: Discover ISTEC Porto's bachelor degrees and choose a higher education path focused on technology, creativity and preparation for the job market.

about.title: 1st cycle of studies with 180 ECTS
about.paragraph1: Bachelor degrees are higher education study cycles lasting six academic semesters, corresponding to 180 ECTS credits.
about.paragraph2: At ISTEC Porto, the training combines scientific foundations, technical skills and practical application, preparing students for real challenges in computing and multimedia.
about.paragraph3: The bachelor degree offer includes Computer Engineering and Multimedia Engineering, with curricula oriented toward innovation, technological development and employability.

listing.title: Find the right bachelor degree for you

licenciatura.noResults: No bachelor degrees were found with the applied filters.
licenciatura.defaultDescription: 1st-cycle bachelor degree with technical, practical and market-oriented training.

hero.title: Postgraduate Courses
hero.description: Discover ISTEC Porto postgraduate courses and deepen specialized skills with training aimed at professional growth.

about.title: Advanced training to strengthen professional skills
about.paragraph1: Postgraduate courses are intended for those who want to update, deepen or specialize their knowledge in a specific area, responding to current labor market needs.
about.paragraph2: At ISTEC Porto, these paths value practical application, proximity to the professional context and the development of relevant technical skills.
about.paragraph3: The postgraduate offer is designed for professionals, graduates and students who want to differentiate their profile and continue evolving in their field.

listing.title: Find the right postgraduate course for you

posGraduacao.noResults: No postgraduate courses were found with the applied filters.
posGraduacao.defaultDescription: Postgraduate course with specialized, practical training oriented toward professional development.

hero.title: Higher Professional Technical Courses
hero.description: Discover ISTEC Porto's CTeSP offer and find a training path with a strong practical component, market connection and focus on your professional integration.

about.title: Practical, specialized and market-oriented training
about.paragraph1: Higher Professional Technical Courses award a Higher Professional Technician Diploma and last two years, divided into four semesters.
about.paragraph2: During the first three semesters, technical training prioritizes practical, laboratory and workshop-based application. The last semester is dedicated to a curricular internship, promoting direct connection with the real work context.
about.paragraph3: This offer prepares students for a solid entry into the professional market, with updated technical skills and relevant experience.

listing.title: Find the right course for you

contacts.subtitle: We're available to answer your questions.

erasmusPage.title: Erasmus+
erasmusPage.subtitle: Mobility Program
erasmusPage.description: Discover international academic mobility opportunities and enrich your journey with a unique experience abroad.
erasmusPage.studyText1: The Erasmus+ program gives students the opportunity to study at a partner institution.
erasmusPage.studyText2: It promotes autonomy, cultural exchange and academic development.
erasmusPage.stepsDescription: A simple path to take part in the program.

steps.title: 1. Application
steps.text: Check the criteria and submit your application within the defined deadline.

steps.title: 2. Selection
steps.text: Applications are reviewed according to the requirements and available places.

steps.title: 3. Preparation
steps.text: After selection, you prepare the documents and study plan for your mobility period.

erasmusPage.partnersDescription: Examples of host institutions for mobility.
erasmusPage.ctaText: Erasmus+ is an opportunity to grow academically and personally through an enriching international experience.

pedagogyPage.title: Pedagogy XXI
pedagogyPage.subtitle: ISTEC PORTO
pedagogyPage.description: The pedagogical area focuses on innovation in teaching and student-centered learning.
pedagogyPage.impactText1: Modern educational practices with active student participation.
pedagogyPage.impactText2: Focus on practical knowledge and real-world preparation.
pedagogyPage.areasDescription: Main areas of pedagogical intervention and development.

areas.title: Teaching Methodologies
areas.text: Innovative pedagogical approaches focused on the student and active learning.

areas.title: Educational Assessment
areas.text: Continuous assessment strategies focused on developing skills.

areas.title: Technology in Education
areas.text: Integration of digital tools in the teaching and learning process.

pedagogyPage.ctaTitle: Innovating in teaching means preparing the future
pedagogyPage.ctaText: Pedagogy is an essential pillar in training qualified, critical professionals who are ready to respond to the challenges of the market and society.
